evaluators.name: Annual 100+ Channels Plan to Checkout Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks that the user selected a qualifying annual plan (100+ channels, < $20/mo effective, annual billing) and viewed the checkout with that plan selected.

evaluators.name: Add Qualifying Sports Add-on and Save Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks that the user selected a qualifying sports add-on (< $10/month, 5+ HD channels) and saved it to the subscription.

evaluators.name: Favorite Required Channel Types and View List Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks that the user favorited one English movies channel, one Spanish news channel, and one all-ages kids channel, and then viewed the favorites list.

evaluators.name: Parental Controls with PIN and TV-14 Limit Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks that the user signed in with the correct account and configured parental controls with a 4-digit PIN, TV-14 maximum rating, and purchase blocking.

evaluators.name: Upgrade to Max Streams Under $30 Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks that the user compared at least two qualifying plans under $30/month and upgraded to the one with the highest simultaneous streams, applying the change immediately.

evaluators.name: Schedule Sports Recording Next Friday at 8 PM Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks that the user scheduled a recording for a sports program on the upcoming Friday at 8:00 PM and set it to be kept for 7 days.

evaluators.name: Switch to Annual Billing with SAVE20 Under $200 Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks that the user switched billing to annual, applied promo code SAVE20, selected an annual plan with discounted total under $200, and confirmed the subscription change.

evaluators.name: Play First Episode of Top 4K Nature Documentary Series Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks that the user started playback of the first episode of the most popular 4K nature documentary series.
